description_long: This coupe car features a sleek, aerodynamic body with a metallic silver finish and a modern, executive design. The front end is characterized by a prominent grille, dual hood vents, and angular headlights, giving it a sporty yet luxurious appearance. The side profile reveals four doors, flush door handles, and alloy wheels, with subtle character lines running along the length of the car. The windows are tinted, and the roofline gently slopes towards the rear, ending in a short trunk with integrated taillights. The interior, visible through the windows, appears to have tan leather seats and a well-appointed dashboard. Chrome accents and detailed trim further enhance the car's upscale look.
description: A silver, four-door coupe car with a sleek, aerodynamic profile, chrome accents, and tan leather interior. The design is sporty yet luxurious, featuring alloy wheels and a gently sloping roofline.
description_view_0: Front view showing the prominent grille, dual hood vents, angular headlights, and a glimpse of the tan interior.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the four-door configuration, alloy wheels, and the smooth, continuous character line along the body.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the short trunk, integrated taillights, and the sloping roofline with visible rear seats.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the door arrangement, alloy wheels, and chrome trim.
attribute_window_configuration: four-door coupe with three side windows per side
